mnemonics: BIG BOOKS ANALYZE: Business Intelligence & Governance, Big Data & Volume, Online & Real-Time, Open Source Tools, Knowledge Discovery, Scalable Systems, Analytics & Visualization, Large-Scale Processing, Yield & Value, Zero Latency Decisions
keyPoints: Key textbooks include 'Mining of Massive Datasets' for algorithms, 'Big Data: Principles and Best Practices' for architecture, and 'Data Science for Business' for strategy.
Focus on concepts like distributed storage (Hadoop HDFS), parallel processing (MapReduce), and real-time analytics (Spark).
Understand the application of these tools in business contexts for predictive modeling, customer segmentation, and trend analysis.
commonMistakes: Confusing the use cases for batch processing (Hadoop) vs. real-time processing (Spark).
Overlooking the importance of data governance, quality, and privacy when dealing with large datasets.
Focusing too much on tools and not enough on the underlying statistical and analytical concepts.
